NAVAREA XIX 84/15

1.R/V BGP PROSPECTOR WILL BE CONDUCTING SEISMIC SURVEY IN THE FOLLOWING POSITION:
A. 70-46.2N 020-02.4E
B. 70-58.0N 021-32.4E
C. 71-22.4N 023-32.2E
D. 71-24.3N 023-50.0E
E. 71-24.5N 024-00.0E
F. 71-25.1 N 024-18.1E
G.72-07.2N 024-25.5E
H.72-09.1N 019-58.3E
I. 70-46.2N 020-02.4E
 
TOWING 10 STREAMERS CABLES OF 8000 METERS LONG.  
REQUEST WIDE BERTH OF 6 NM ASTERN, 3 NM AHEAD AND 3 NM ABEAM OF THE VESSEL.
GUARD VESSEL GEO SERVICE 1 IN ATTENDANCE.
